title: Visual Board Customizations

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team’s current workflow requires bouncing between several boards. Some of the boards use similar column names and structure, which can be visually confusing.

It would be great if we could make minor visual customizations to the boards, like a heading color change or image (similar to the workspace home page) to better differentiate between boards.

Screenshot 2023-10-20 at 1.30.20 PM1649×438 54.6 KB

A minor change like this would be a big help for our team.
